steps.title: Separate the first kit
steps.content: The first seed kit costs $18$ dollars. If $x$ kits are purchased total, then the number of kits after the first is $x-1$.

steps.title: Write the total cost
steps.content:
The additional kits cost $13$ dollars each, so the total cost is the first-kit cost plus the additional-kit cost.
$$y=18+13(x-1)$$
$$y=13(x-1)+18$$

steps.title: Match the equation
steps.content: This equation charges $18$ dollars for the first kit and $13$ dollars for each of the remaining $x-1$ kits. The answer is C.
